task_description: Wave 6 (FINAL) - Real-time Data Pipelines, Edge/CDN Optimization, Advanced Security, Comprehensive Documentation, and Final Polish to bring the Quant-Ecosystem to its absolute maximum level (Meta/Google grade).

verification.summary: Full monorepo passes: typecheck (145/145), build (115/115), test (146/146 - 100 total new tests across 3 packages), lint (119/119). All new packages integrate cleanly. Tests exercise real code paths (Redis Streams patterns, AES-256-GCM crypto, middleware config composition).
